use_cases: AI content and image generation triggers in creative applications
Code generation actions in developer tools and IDEs
Form submission with animated feedback states
Real-time data fetching with visual progress indication
ai_summary: An animated button component with generation-focused styling, featuring smooth state transitions between idle and active/generating modes. Includes customizable hue-based highlighting, inner shadow depth effects, and SVG icon animation support. Designed for triggering AI-powered generation workflows with visual feedback. Fully accessible with aria attributes and keyboard navigation support.
